testCases.title: Payment — All Methods in Dropdown
testCases.notes: Payment method dropdown on /cart shows 5 methods: Bank card (Authorize.Net), Bank card (CyberSource), Bank card (Datatrans), Pay with points, Bank card (Skyflow). All 5 payment processors available. Verified in CHK-006.

testCases.title: Payment — CyberSource: iFrames on Cart Page
testCases.notes: Selecting CyberSource: 2 iframes load from testflex.cybersource.com. Payment form embedded in /cart. CyberSource uniquely shows form on cart page (not /checkout/payment). Verified in CHK-006 and Suite 039.

testCases.title: Payment — Authorize.Net: Redirect to /checkout/payment
testCases.notes: Per project memory: Authorize.Net, Skyflow, Datatrans redirect to /checkout/payment after 'Place Order'. They do NOT show payment form on /cart. Architectural pattern confirmed.

testCases.title: Payment — Skyflow: Available in Dropdown
testCases.notes: Bank card (Skyflow) available in payment method dropdown. Skyflow processor configured in store. Selection available to customers.

testCases.title: Payment — Datatrans: Available in Dropdown
testCases.notes: Bank card (Datatrans) available in payment method dropdown. Datatrans processor configured in store.

testCases.title: Payment — Pay with Points: Available
testCases.notes: 'Pay with points' option available in payment dropdown. Loyalty points payment method configured. B2B org users can pay with accumulated points.

testCases.title: Payment — Payment Method Persists in Cart State
testCases.notes: Payment method selection (CyberSource) persists in cart state. Returning to /cart after navigation shows same payment method selected. Server-side cart persists payment selection.

testCases.title: Payment — Billing Address Required for All Methods
testCases.notes: Billing address* field required for all payment methods. 'Please select a billing address' placeholder shown. Place Order disabled until billing address selected. Consistent across all payment methods.

testCases.title: Payment — Order Summary Visible with Any Payment Method
testCases.notes: ORDER SUMMARY (Subtotal $100.00, Discount -$0.01, Tax +$20.00, Shipping $0.00, Total $119.99) visible regardless of payment method selected. Pricing consistent.

testCases.title: Payment — HTTPS for All Payment Pages
testCases.notes: HTTPS enforced on /cart (payment form page) and /checkout/payment (redirect destination). All payment interactions over encrypted connection.

testCases.title: Payment — JWT Bearer Auth for Payment Mutations
testCases.notes: Payment mutations (cart, order placement) use Bearer JWT Authorization header. Cross-origin CSRF protection via JWT Bearer architecture (cannot be set cross-origin). Verified in SEC-CSRF-003.

testCases.title: Payment — Saved Credit Cards Menu Available
testCases.notes: B2B account menu (Carlos Rodriguez) shows 'Saved credit cards' item in sidebar navigation. Feature available for future payment method saving after successful order.

testCases.title: Payment — Authorize.Net: Place Order Then Payment Form
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Testing Authorize.Net payment form on /checkout/payment requires clicking Place Order first. Cannot complete without Authorize.Net test card credentials.

testCases.title: Payment — Skyflow: Place Order Then Payment Form
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Skyflow payment form on /checkout/payment requires Place Order click and Skyflow test credentials. Not available in this test run.

testCases.title: Payment — Datatrans: Place Order Then Payment Form
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Datatrans payment form requires Place Order + Datatrans test credentials.

testCases.title: Payment — CyberSource: Complete Payment with Test Card
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: CYBERSOURCE_VISA test card not configured. Cannot complete CyberSource payment.

testCases.title: Payment — Pay with Points: Points Balance Check
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: 'Pay with points' flow requires checking loyalty points balance for the B2B org user. Points balance not verified in this run. Feature availability confirmed (option in dropdown).

testCases.title: Payment — Order Placed: Appears in Order History
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Cannot verify order in history without completing payment flow.

testCases.title: Payment — Payment Decline Error Handling
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Decline handling requires test card data with decline configuration.

testCases.title: Payment — 3DS Authentication Flow
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: 3DS authentication requires test card with 3DS configured. Cannot test without credentials.

testCases.title: Payment — Manual Payment Method
testCases.notes: NOTE: 5th payment option identified as 'Manual' in addition to the 4 card processors and Pay with points (CHK-006 shows 5 total options including Manual). Manual payment selection available.

testCases.title: Payment — Payment Method Change Clears Previous Form
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Switching payment methods and verifying previous form cleared (e.g., CyberSource iframes removed when switching to Authorize.Net) deferred.
